pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Is that so? Is that so?~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Who's there? I can hear you fluttering around, but I can't see a thing. Show yourself!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Is that so? Is that so?~

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Who's there? Show yourself! It's getting so dark I can’t even see the tip of my own broom.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Darkness is more fun when you're inside it, don't you think?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Oh, it's just a low-level youkai. Do you ever get tired of stretching your arms out like that?

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: It's a holy gesture! Also, I don't get lost if I'm pointing in every direction.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: The only thing you're pointing toward is a quick trip to the afterlife. Move, I have a real incident to solve.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Too late! My stomach just growled. You look like a delicious red-and-white snack!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Try a bite. I’m a lot harder to swallow than I look.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: That's for getting in my way. Now, why is the mist so thick here?

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: I don’t know! I just like it because it's dim. It’s perfect for napping.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Reimu Hakurei
post.text: Useless as always. Go find a tree to haunt.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: The mist is nice, isn’t it? It makes everything feel like a midnight snack. And speaking of snacks... I haven’t had a human today.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Listen, kid, I don’t have time for the "I’m gonna eat you" routine. Go find a stray cat or somethin’. I’ve got a real incident to solve.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Is "solving an incident" what humans call "getting lost in the dark"?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: It’s called "investigating." And if you don’t move, I’m gonna "investigate" how many Master Sparks it takes to brighten up your attitude.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: Darkness is more than just a lack of light, you know. It’s where the teeth are.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Then I guess I’ll just have to knock a few out! Move it or lose it, little darkness!

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Rumia
pre.text: I think I’ll just take a bite out of your "investigation" instead!

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Ouch, ouch, ouch... My eyes! Everything is too bright!

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: Told ya. You’re all talk and no bite, Rumia. Now, tell me. Which way did that red mist get thicker?

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: That way... I think. It smells like iron and fancy tea over there.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: Fancy tea, huh? Sounds like someone with too much time and too much magic on their hands.

post.speaker: boss
post.name: Rumia
post.text: Are you really going? If you get eaten by someone bigger than me, I’m going to be very disappointed that I missed out on lunch.

post.speaker: player
post.name: Marisa Kirisame
post.text: If I find the person behind this, I’m gonna make them pay for my dry cleaning. This mist is stickier than it looks.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Hmm, so this fairy is also affected...

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: You shouldn’t be wandering around the lake right now. it’s becoming quite a lovely shade of red, don't you think?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: I don’t have time to play tag with a Greater Fairy. Step aside

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: Cirno said I shouldn’t let anyone pass. She’s busy being the 'strongest' today, and I have to help keep the perimeter clear!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Cirno? That ice brat is behind this? No, she’s not smart enough to manage a mist this thick.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: I thought only the big shots were feelin' the buzz, but you're lookin' pretty pumped for a commoner.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Daiyousei
pre.text: Are you here to steal the mist? It’s not for humans to take!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Steal it? Nah, I’ve got enough junk in my house. But it’s definitely boostin' your magic levels.

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Where there’s a cold mist and a lot of noise, there’s usually an idiot nearby.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Are you here to cool off? Because I’m about to make you permanent ice!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Actually, I’m here to find out who’s responsible for this red mist.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Red mist? Who cares about that! Look at me! Can’t you feel the power?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: You’re making it colder, sure, but you aren't the one spreading the mist. You’re just a minor freezing hazard that's getting in my way.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Minor?! I'll show you minor! I'm so strong I could freeze the whole lake and your shrine along with it!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Reimu Hakurei
pre.text: Hah... why do I even bother talking to fairies?

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Let’s see... according to the map in my head, there oughta be a big estate right around here. This mist is a real pain for navigatin'

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Hey! You! The human on the broom! Stop right there!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Huh. I wonder if the mist is thicker toward the center of the lake. If the water vapor is denser, the magic refraction would be off the charts.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: Hey! Don't you 'huh' me! I'm talking to you! The Great Cirno is standing right in front of your face!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Man, it’s even gettin' noisy. Must be the wind howlin' through the trees.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I AM NOT THE WIND! I’m the strongest ice fairy in the world, and you’re totally ignoring me! I’m right here!

pre.speaker: player
pre.name: Marisa Kirisame
pre.text: Oh, hey, it's you. When did you get here? You're blockin' my view.

pre.speaker: boss
pre.name: Cirno
pre.text: I’VE BEEN HERE THE WHOLE TIME! Prepare to be turned into a popsicle, you blind magician!!
